title: PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT - 211info
text: MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER PREGNANCY AND PARENTING SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Pregnancy supplies include pre-natal vitamins, morning sickness kits, pregnancy pillows, maternity clothing, and pregnancy and parenting books. Staff are available to meet with clients to answer pregnancy and parenting questions or provide referrals to other programs. 1515 NE 41st Avenue Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Parenting classes offered for children up to the age of 2 Hours: Helpline: 7 days per week In person Monday-Thursday 10am-5pm, Friday 10am-3pm Email (503) 249-5801 . Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main line (503) 249-5801 [email protected] Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 10am-4pm, Wednesday 1pm-4pm, Friday 10am-2pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located at the corner of 41st and Halsey. Street parking. Do not park in Trader Joe's or Comcast lots. Directly across from Hollywood Transit Center (MAX Red and Blue lines, bus lines 75 and 77) Services: Parenting Helplines Parenting Materials Specialized Information and Referral * Parenting Issues Other Services Offered At This Location: INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENTING GROUPS AND CLASSES MATERIAL GOODS - CLOTHING AND BABY SUPPLIES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. MOTHER & CHILD EDUCATION CENTER
